tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read contents of a file given its path.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file at the specified path.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List files and subdirectories in a directory.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file at the specified path.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to a recipient with subject and body.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email.

tools.name: get_calendar
tools.description: Get calendar events for a date range.

tools.name: run_sql
tools.description: Execute a SQL query on the database.

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a new database table with given schema.

tools.name: export_data
tools.description: Export query results to a file.

tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Run Python code in a sandboxed environment.

tools.name: install_package
tools.description: Install a Python package via pip.
